user_query: I'm creating a playlist for my workout sessions and I need some energetic tracks. Can you suggest some popular artists and tracks in the genres 'electronic' and 'hip hop'? Also, provide me with the lyrics for the song 'Can't Stop the Feeling' and a download link for it.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a list of popular artists and tracks in the electronic genre.
Retrieve a list of popular artists and tracks in the hip hop genre.
Fetch the lyrics for the song 'Can't Stop the Feeling'.
Provide a download link for the song 'Can't Stop the Feeling'.
